suggestions.name: FileAgeComparator
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit responsible for comparing file modification times against various temporal references. They share the same core responsibility of determining file age relationships

suggestions.name: FileWriter

suggestions.name: StreamCopier
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive unit responsible for copying data from various input streams to file destinations. They share common patterns of resource management, stream handling, and data transfer o

suggestions.name: FileConverter
suggestions.rationale: These methods form a cohesive conversion unit that transforms various representations (URLs, string paths) into File objects. They share URL decoding logic, protocol validation, and path construction
